note: Created directly in doing/in-progress. Tier-family shared-dep uninstall bug found via user's LTX High+Balanced uninstall leaving ~19GB stranded (library bars 45%/37% instead of ~5%). Root = _localSharedDepsMap per-dep on-disk protection is circular for tier families. Fix option C. Twin-check remote path.

Broadened to UMBRELLA card (user request: all related Model-Library dep/download bugs in ONE card). Bug 1 (tier-family uninstall) FIXED + tested, awaiting live verify. Bug 2 (ResumableDownloader corrupts 25GB LTX transformer across stall/Pause-Resume -> SHA256 mismatch) DIAGNOSED: R2 source verified perfect via curl (hash matches registry), corruption is app resume-path only; NOT a hash-recompute problem. Bug 3 (partial-install bar % inflated ~94 vs true ~56; nodes already excluded MPI-231, queued-only denominator is the cause) OBSERVED. Sequence: install Balanced single-stream (no pause) -> verify Bug1 uninstall -> then Bug2 -> Bug3.

BUG 1 FIRST FIX FAILED LIVE. User installed Balanced (single-stream, clean, hash-verified) then uninstalled -> log 'uninstall ltx-23-balanced: removed 0, kept 9 shared', toast 'all files shared with other models or required by engine', Balanced still shows INSTALLED. ROOT of the regression: my mid-install protection loop gated on depJob.refCount>0, but refCount stays >0 AFTER an install completes (only decremented on uninstall/disk-full rollback). So every just-installed dep was protected -> uninstall no-op. SECOND FIX: gate the in-flight loop on depJob.status==='downloading'||'queued' (a live download), NOT refCount. The whole-model gate (entry.installed!==true) is correct — verified localModelsCheck reports BOTH LTX tiers installed=false (High missing bf16, Balanced missing mxfp8 because resolveFullUniverse is NOT arch-filtered and carries both arch transformers). Added regression test (status=complete+refCount>0 must NOT protect); all 5 assertions pass. NEEDS SERVER RESTART to load. NOTE for later: resolveFullUniverse returning both arch variants means the guard never sees a usable tier as 'installed' — fine for delete-more, but revisit if it causes over-deletion of a genuinely-installed sibling.

BUG 1 LIVE-VERIFIED FIXED: log 'uninstall ltx-23-balanced: removed 9, kept 0 shared' after server restart with the status-gate fix; ~45GB freed, both LTX bars 0%, 6 installed. BUG 3 (bar accuracy) IMPLEMENTED as option A: _computePartial in MpiModelManager.js now excludes deps owned by an already-installed OTHER model (union of resolveFullUniverse over installed MODELS) from BOTH sides of the partial ratio. Root of the confusing %s: SDXL '1%' = shared 4x-NMKD upscaler (67MB) on disk; PiD '4%' = 2 shared VAEs (vae-flux-ae 335MB + vae-qwen-image 254MB) owned by Krea2. After exclusion, simulated on real dep data: sdxl-realistic/nvidia-pid/ltx-23/ltx-23-balanced ALL -> 0%. Frontend-only change -> needs renderer reload (window refresh), NOT a server restart. LEFTOVER: uninstall left an empty G:/CubricModels/loras/ltx-2.3/id-lora-talkvid/ dir shell (file trashed, dir not cleaned) — minor, cleanEmptyDirs may not recurse nested lora subdir.

BUG 3 refinement: after excluding shared deps the bar still rendered a 0% track (ugly) because _computePartial returned hasPartialProgress:true with progress:0 whenever a model's own dep existed in the registry but wasn't on disk (total>0 && !allInstalled, downloaded=0). Added downloaded>0 gate: a partial bar only draws when some of THIS model's own bytes are actually on disk; otherwise _tileState falls through to the 'Install' chip (no bar). Genuine interrupted partials still show. Unit test: 0-downloaded->no bar, real partial->bar, all-installed->no partial (PASS). Frontend-only -> renderer reload.

BUG 3 stubborn-LTX fix: images went to Install chip but both LTX tiers still drew a 0% bar. Cause: ComfyUI-LTXVideo (custom_nodes, 70MB) stays on disk after uninstall and is NOT owned by any installed model, so it wasn't excluded -> downloaded=70MB>0 -> bar. Fix: _computePartial now also excludes dep.type==='custom_nodes' (work-not-bytes), same rule the active-download bar already applies (_byteRatioExcludingNodes, MPI-231). Verified on real deps: sdxl-realistic/nvidia-pid/ltx-23/ltx-23-balanced ALL hasPartialProgress=false -> Install chip, no bar. Frontend-only -> renderer reload.
